title: M3 need-driven exact-index caller-owned surfaces
summary: Add caller-owned version-bound Into selection and read surfaces for food, rest, and medical exact indexes before WM-0170 resumes.
acceptance: M3FoodAvailabilityStore exposes caller-owned selectCandidatesInto and readPortionInto surfaces that bind selected portion/stack/target facts to food owner/index versions and dirty-backlog basis in one reset-on-entry flat output; a dirty stack that has not advanced the owner version is still rejected during final revalidation

RestCandidateIndex exposes caller-owned selectCandidatesInto and RestSleepStore exposes readFixtureInto so one selected fixture binds both the index-cached and current row owner versions, RestSleepStore/source/index versions, schedule-window id/version, weather exposure/version/source version, outdoor-work decision, target/cell, score and cap counters without materializing a result; a missed dirty row cannot be hidden by refreshing another row

M3MedicalCareStore exposes caller-owned selectTreatmentRequestsInto, readPatientRequestInto and readCaregiverStateInto surfaces; a maintained per-bucket count supplies the exact total without scanning past the cap, and the successful output carries patient condition plus the complete caregiver id/ability/minimum/value/condition/base-version/valid/allowed tuple and medical version

All new selection surfaces use caller-owned fixed-cap scratch/output, reject candidate caps above 24 and retained caps above 12, order by integer score then source-row id then target id, reset every output lane, and make no object, array, typed-array, closure or dynamic-string allocation in the complete hot call closure

Existing allocating APIs, snapshots, hashes, drivers and historical food/rest/medical scenarios remain behavior-compatible; the new Into paths are additive public owner surfaces and do not duplicate owner truth into WorkOffer rows

owner-hot-path-surfaces.test.ts gives food/rest/medical/health distinct module identities, audits the receiver-exact complete transitive closure of every new root, includes a same-named-helper collision regression, and proves output/scratch identity, stale owner/row/index/backlog rejection, cap metrics and parity with existing behavior; all required types and roots are exported from packages/sim-core/src/index.ts
The task does not modify game-session-autonomy, m3-health, WorkOffer, pathing, ReservationLedger, GameSession, protocol, Worker, client, save/load, dependencies or release surfaces

history.details: Independent WM-0170 owner-index stop-line decision selected strict prerequisite B and rejected derived WorkOffer mirroring for need-driven food/rest/medical candidates.
WM-0177 is done and the independent systems-architect packet fully refined the strict owner-index repair.
Locked Rest cached/current row plus schedule/weather owner tuples, exact Medical bucket totals and caregiver output, bounded Into caps, and collision-safe hot-path module identities.

Implemented seven caller-owned food/rest/medical exact-index roots with 24/12 bounds, explicit owner/row/backlog/environment/caregiver revalidation, exact medical bucket totals, 161-entry allocation closure, 46 focused and 499 full tests passing; report coordination/reports/WM-0181.md.

verified: No blocking findings; main...b4b777d exact eight-file product/test scope and seven Into roots verified; legacy parity, 24/12 caps, Food dirty rejection, Rest dual-row/three-environment/missed-dirty rejection, Medical exact totals/complete caregiver/forbidden-read rejection, 161-entry closure and package exports confirmed; typecheck, focused 46/46, boundaries 16, handoff, taskctl validate/status, diff checks, and quality 79/79 files 499/499 tests passed; one worktree; no benchmark or admission run.

Fast-forwarded main from 2338f16 to verified commit 6ddb118; post-integration quality passed 79 files/499 tests, handoff 1776 files/181 tasks/10 roles, taskctl validate/status and diff-check passed; no benchmark/admission run.

forbiddenPaths: GameSession/runtime integration owned by WM-0171, protocol, Worker, apps, renderer, UI or save/load
derived WorkOffer mirrors for food/rest/treatment, global entity/map/store scans, per-call allocation, callback selection or unbounded sort
runtime dependencies, benchmark/admission changes, PR-3 commands or release actions
executionLane: simulation-engineer; Spark is prohibited because this task repairs generic owner-version and allocation boundaries consumed by deterministic autonomy
singleWriterRule: WM-0181 is the sole repair writer. WM-0170 remains blocked with its Phase A/B1 checkpoint until WM-0181 is independently verified, integrated and done; WM-0171 remains proposed behind WM-0170.
